packages.title: Deep Clean House
packages.description: Recurring home upkeep that is easy to forget until it becomes annoying.
packages.author: Cycle

items.title: Clean baseboards
items.description: Wipe down baseboards in the main rooms and hallway.

items.title: Degrease range hood filters
items.description: Soak and scrub the kitchen hood filters before grease builds up.

items.title: Clean fridge coils
items.description: Vacuum fridge coils to keep the compressor running efficiently.

packages.title: Car Care Basics
packages.description: Essential vehicle upkeep so the car stays clean, legal, and lower-stress.
packages.author: Cycle

items.title: Reset the car interior
items.description: Clear trash, wipe the dashboard, and vacuum the most-used areas.

items.title: Check car fluids
items.description: Review windshield washer fluid, engine oil, and coolant levels.

items.title: Review insurance and documents
items.description: Confirm policy renewal dates, roadside coverage, and registration details.

packages.title: Digital Admin Reset
packages.description: Keep digital life calm with recurring admin rituals that stop small messes from compounding.
packages.author: Cycle

items.title: Clean the downloads folder
items.description: Delete junk files and move anything worth keeping into a real home.

items.title: Reset the inbox
items.description: Archive stale threads, answer the important ones, and unsubscribe from noise.

items.title: Review backups
items.description: Check that core devices and documents still have a working backup path.
